blockingIssues.description: Section 5.5 Support Ticket Payloads lists `priority` as a field in SupportTicketCreateRequest, but the actual DTO only has three fields: category, subject, description. This pre-existing inaccuracy was not caught by the fix. Frontend developers would implement a priority selector that doesn't exist in the backend.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Section 3.2 point 2 claims SUPER_ADMIN cannot access /api/v1/admin/users, but the route table in Section 2.3 lists ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN for that endpoint. The note should clarify that SUPER_ADMIN accesses admin endpoints through platform-level authority, not through tenant-level ROLE_ADMIN inheritance.
Section 3.2 has duplicate numbering: items 3 and 3 (Portal insights and Portal finance). Should be renumbered 1-6 sequentially.
